{{Infobox event
| name = Elder War
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

''See also: [[Elder War Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Elder]] War was a massive, decades-long conflict that fundamentally reshaped the world. It was ignited when a figure known as [[the Liberator]] launched a war against [[Nakothi]], an action that stirred the [[Great Elders]] into various forms of activity. During this period, the [[Elders]]' responses were unpredictable: some engaged in combat with one another, others launched campaigns to eradicate humanity, and some acted without apparent logic. The war featured celestial battles in the [[void]] and significant human resistance, including a major confrontation at a fortification where humanity's strongest warriors managed to trap a [[Great Elder]] before delivering a killing blow. The conflict is known by several names, including [[Kelarac]]’s War or the [[Battle of Candle Bay]]. While some news outlets referred to it as the Second [[Elder]] War, that title did not gain widespread traction. The aftermath of the war left the world in a state of chaos, with the very earth heaving as the [[Great Elders]] were defeated. Although the [[Great Elders]] were eventually overthrown, their destruction only provided a temporary reprieve, as they are expected to rise again in the future. The war remains a defining historical event, serving as a benchmark for tragedy and military scale.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Emperor]] wore his current armor during the [[Elder War]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Elder War]] is a historical event.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Elder War]] involved [[Great Elders]] fighting in human bodies.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A second [[Elder War]] is a potential consequence of [[Jerri]]'s decision.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Elder War]] occurred in the past.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] have appeared five or six times since the [[Elder War]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The death of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] is considered a major tragedy since the [[Elder War]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Elder War]] was a conflict during which the greatest warriors of humanity trapped the [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“I may not have seen the Elder War, but I know what I know.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire events]]
